final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing employee ID badge for a fictional company called 字节期动, front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, corporate ID card mockup
Subject: employee badge with photo placeholder, name field, ID number, company logo area, front and back views
Composition: flat lay product shot, two cards arranged side by side showing front and reverse, top-down perspective
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral surface, subtle shadow beneath cards
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from top-left, minimal shadows, professional corporate mood
Color palette: corporate blue and white as base, subtle gray accents
Materials/textures: matte plastic card surface, smooth rounded corners, subtle thickness visible at edges
Text (verbatim): "字节期动"
Constraints: both front and back sides must be visible; realistic card thickness and proportions; readable layout
Avoid: cartoonish rendering, overly glossy surfaces, distorted text, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic
